videos.title: HTML Lists Tutorial - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn about HTML unordered lists, ordered lists, and description lists with practical examples and CSS styling.

videos.title: HTML Unordered Lists - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Part of the freeCodeCamp HTML course focusing on unordered lists, list items, and nested lists.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Lists - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML list elements including ul, ol, li, and dl with practical navigation menu examples.

videos.title: CSS List Styling - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell shows how to style unordered lists with custom bullets, removing default styles, and creating horizontal menus.

videos.title: HTML Lists and Navigation - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Learn how to use HTML unordered lists to build navigation menus and site structures.
